title: ATO Internal Domain Contracts
$comment: Semantic validation MUST enforce legal lifecycle transitions, immutable revision and run behavior, referential integrity, hash and HMAC recomputation, citation offset ordering and source bounds, evidence-chunk digest derivation, exact matrix coverage, logical-key uniqueness, authorization, no self-approval, and approval expiry.

content_manifest_sha256.$comment: Upload inventory digest from finalize. Distinct from package_content_sha256, which binds the sealed canonical package document at confirm.

package_content_sha256.$comment: Canonical package document digest sealed at confirm. Required keys are always present; values remain null until Diff 5 confirm writes sealed content. A staged invariant (not yet DB-enforced) will require non-null values for ready revisions once confirm is wired.

system_context_snapshot_id.$comment: Immutable system-context snapshot referenced by the sealed package. Null until confirm selects or creates the snapshot in Diff 5.

revision_version.$comment: Optimistic-concurrency token persisted with the revision. Initial value 1 on creation. Incremented exactly once for each successful source-artifact addition and each successful lifecycle transition. Exposed as strong ETag "v{revision_version}".

organization_defined_parameters.$comment: The source representation is retained without loss and is validated against the applicable pinned authority or customer schema.

validation_outcome.$comment: The v2 specification requires this field but does not enumerate its closed values.

action.$comment: Section 13.12 calls this an enum but does not publish the allowed values.

object_type.$comment: This is the audited target object type. Section 13.12 calls it an enum but does not publish the allowed values.

Job.$comment: Semantic validation MUST enforce at most one Job per (run_id, step_key) and legal job-status transitions.

attempt_count.$comment: Durable count of JobAttempt rows. Upper bound is enforced by runtime TEXT_MODEL_MAX_RETRIES + 1 semantic validation, not this schema.

JobAttempt.$comment: Semantic validation MUST enforce at most one JobAttempt per (job_id, attempt_number) and at most one active JobAttempt per job_id.

attempt_number.$comment: Sequence number within the owning job. Uniqueness on (job_id, attempt_number) is enforced outside this schema.

PackageRevisionIntakeWork.$comment: Semantic validation MUST enforce at most one intake work row per (package_revision_id, work_phase) and legal intake-work status transitions.

PackageRevisionIntakeAttempt.$comment: Semantic validation MUST enforce at most one PackageRevisionIntakeAttempt per (package_revision_id, work_phase, attempt_number) and at most one active attempt per work row.

PackageNormalizationStep.$comment: Revision-scoped durable record for one normalize_proposal v1 step. input_digest is the SHA-256 of canonical reservation inputs; fact_bundle_sha256 is the SHA-256 of canonical normalize-proposal-fact-bundle bytes and may differ. Semantic validation MUST enforce at most one row per (package_revision_id, step_key), legal status transitions, and repair_attempted implies llm_call_count=2.
